entry.title: RAGLAN CROPPED TEE - ROYAL BLUE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: Product
Price: 1399.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

240 GSM. Premium French Terry Cotton. Cropped Silhouette with Raglan Full Sleeves. Minimal Design. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This cropped 240 GSM full-sleeve T-shirt from Drip Studios is crafted for a clean, super-decent everyday look. Designed with raglan sleeves, it offers a relaxed shoulder fit and effortless movement, while the cropped length adds a modern, balanced silhouette. Made from premium French terry cotton, this tee delivers softness, breathability, and lasting comfort. With its basic, minimal aesthetic and refined finish, it’s a versatile essential that pairs easily with any wardrobe for understated style.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to preserve fabric quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain the fabric’s integrity.

Core Features

240 GSM French terry fabric for a lightweight yet premium feel. Cropped length with full raglan sleeves for a relaxed, modern fit. Gender-neutral design suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton for all-day comfort. Bio-washed finish ensures durability and a smooth hand feel.

entry.title: YOUNG RICH MIGHTY II
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 2199.00

260 GSM. Premium Heavyweight Fabric. High-Detail Puff Print Front & Back. Gender-Neutral. Relaxed Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Exclusive YRM Limited Edition.

This 260 GSM premium T-shirt from the exclusive YRM limited-edition collection is designed to make a bold, unmistakable statement. Crafted from heavyweight fabric, it offers a structured yet breathable feel that delivers all-day comfort with a strong streetwear presence. The front and back feature intricately detailed “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” artwork executed in high-definition puff print, creating a striking raised texture that adds depth, dimension, and a premium visual impact. Designed for those who stand out effortlessly, this piece blends luxury aesthetics with everyday wearability. Combed and bio-washed for superior softness and long-lasting durability, it maintains its shape and finish over time while elevating your wardrobe with a powerful identity.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve fabric quality and puff print detailing. Do not iron directly on the prints. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM premium heavyweight fabric for a structured, high-end feel. Relaxed, gender-neutral fit designed for statement streetwear. High-detail “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” puff print on both front and back for elevated texture and depth. Exclusive YRM limited-edition release for a distinctive look. Combed and bio-washed fabric for enhanced softness, durability, and long-term shape retention.

entry.title: D'OR SAINT - Ltd. Ed.
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1599.00

240 GSM. Premium Fabric. Cropped Ringer Design. Embroidered Front Detail. 100% Combed Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Regular-Fit Cropped Silhouette. Limited Edition (100 Pieces). Combed & Bio-washed.

This exclusive 240 GSM cropped ringer T-shirt from Drip Studios is crafted to deliver a refined balance of vintage inspiration and modern luxury. Designed with signature contrast ringer trims on the neckline and sleeves, it features a clean cropped silhouette with a relaxed waist that offers effortless structure and comfort. The front is elevated with a finely embroidered detail that adds a subtle yet premium statement without overpowering the minimal aesthetic. Made from high-grade combed and bio-washed cotton, the fabric feels exceptionally soft, breathable, and durable for everyday wear. Strictly limited to only 100 pieces, this piece is designed for those who appreciate exclusivity, precision, and timeless streetwear luxury.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and preserve the embroidery. Avoid harsh detergents or bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the structure. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric and embroidery finish.

Core Features

240 GSM premium cotton fabric delivering a structured yet comfortable feel. Cropped ringer silhouette with contrast neckline and sleeve trims for a timeless aesthetic. Finely embroidered front detail adding a subtle luxury statement. Regular-fit cropped design with a relaxed waist for balanced structure and movement. Gender-neutral silhouette suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton ensures all-day comfort. Bio-washed finish for enhanced softness and long-term durability. Exclusively limited to only 100 pieces.

entry.title: REGULAR RINGER CROPPED TEE II
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1399.00

240 GSM. Premium Fabric. Minimal Design. 100% Combed Cotton. Ringer Style Neck & Sleeves. Gender-Neutral. Regular-Fit Cropped Silhouette. Combed & Bio-washed.

This premium 240 GSM ringer cropped T-shirt from Drip Studios blends classic aesthetics with a modern cropped silhouette. Designed with contrasting ringer detailing on the neckline and sleeve hems, it delivers a subtle vintage-inspired edge while maintaining a clean, minimal look. The regular cropped fit offers balanced structure with everyday comfort, making it easy to style across casual and streetwear outfits. Crafted from 100% combed cotton and finished with a bio-wash, the fabric feels soft, breathable, and durable for long-lasting wear. With no prints or graphics, this tee remains a versatile wardrobe essential built for effortless styling.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain fabric quality and structure. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the finish.

Core Features

240 GSM premium cotton fabric for a balanced, structured feel. Regular-fit cropped silhouette designed for modern everyday wear. Classic ringer neckline and sleeve contrast detailing. Minimal blank design for versatile styling. Gender-neutral construction suitable for multiple body types. Combed and bio-washed cotton for enhanced softness, breathability, and durability.

entry.title: YOUNG RICH MIGHTY
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 2199.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Relaxed Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Premium Puff & Screen Print. Exclusive Limited Edition.

This 260 GSM French terry cotton T-shirt is crafted to combine premium comfort with bold, statement-driven design. Built from heavyweight French terry cotton, the fabric delivers a smooth, structured feel while remaining breathable and durable for all-day wear. Designed as an exclusive limited-edition release, the front features the striking “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” artwork executed in a combination of premium puff and screen printing for layered texture and depth. The back carries the signature 09 brand number in the same high-quality print finish, creating a cohesive, standout identity from every angle. Combed and bio-washed for long-lasting softness and shape retention, this tee is made for those who move with confidence and presence.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain print texture and fabric quality. Do not iron directly on the prints. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM French terry cotton for a premium heavyweight structure. Relaxed, gender-neutral fit designed for everyday statement wear. Front “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” artwork in premium puff and screen print combination. Back brand number 09 executed in matching high-quality print finish. Exclusive limited-edition design for elevated street presence. Combed and bio-washed fabric for enhanced softness, durability, and long-term shape retention.

entry.title: NAVY POLO
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

220 GSM. Super Premium Matte Lycra Fabric. Refined Polo Construction. Combed & Bio-washed. Gender-Neutral. Tailored Regular Fit.

This super-premium 220 GSM polo T-shirt from Drip Studios is designed for those who appreciate quiet luxury in everyday essentials. Crafted from a refined matte lycra blend, the fabric offers a smooth, elevated finish with natural stretch for comfort and structure. The tailored regular fit delivers a sharp, composed silhouette, while the classic polo collar adds a touch of timeless sophistication.

Combed and bio-washed for exceptional softness and durability, this polo balances breathability, polish, and long-lasting performance. Built to transition seamlessly from relaxed settings to elevated occasions, it stands as a modern wardrobe staple defined by restraint, precision, and premium craftsmanship.

Care Guide

Wash inside out with similar colors using cold water to preserve the fabric’s finish and depth. Avoid harsh detergents. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and elasticity. Store folded in a cool, dry space to retain its premium quality.

Core Features

220 GSM super-premium matte lycra fabric for a smooth, luxurious finish. Refined polo collar for timeless versatility. Tailored regular fit for a composed, elevated silhouette. Combed cotton blend ensures breathability and all-day comfort. Bio-washed treatment enhances softness, durability, and fabric longevity.

entry.title: TEMPTING
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 1749.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Dual-Tone Colors. Gender-Neutral. Relaxed Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Puff Print. Made for Club & House Parties.

This 260 GSM French terry cotton T-shirt is designed to blend soft aesthetics with bold, nightlife-ready detailing. Available in two refined shades—Baby Pink and Off-White—it delivers a clean yet statement-driven look. Crafted from premium French terry cotton, the fabric offers a smooth, substantial feel with breathable comfort and durability. Made specially for club and house parties, the front features a minimal printed logo for a refined finish, while the back stands out with a bold puff print reading “AGAIN TEMPTED” alongside the signature 9, adding depth, texture, and standout appeal under lights. Combed and bio-washed for lasting softness, this tee is built for elevated after-dark wear.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve the puff print texture. Do not iron directly on the print. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM French terry cotton for a premium, heavyweight feel. Baby Pink and Off-White colorways crafted for night-out styling. Relaxed, gender-neutral fit ideal for club and house parties. Front logo print with bold “AGAIN TEMPTED” and 9 puff print on the back. High-quality puff printing for a textured, high-impact finish. Combed and bio-washed fabric for superior softness, durability, and shape retention.

entry.title: HENLEY - BLACK
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

220 GSM. Hefty Cotton Fabric. Slim Fit Body-Hugging Silhouette. 96% Cotton & 4% Spandex. Gender-Neutral. Made in India.

This premium 220 GSM slim-fit T-shirt is designed to elevate everyday essentials with a refined, body-hugging silhouette. Crafted from a luxurious blend of 96% cotton and 4% spandex, it offers the perfect balance of softness, stretch, and structure for all-day comfort. The hefty cotton fabric delivers a smooth, premium hand feel while maintaining breathability and shape retention. Thoughtfully made in India, this tee is built to move with you—enhancing your style with clean lines, superior fit, and lasting quality.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve fabric stretch and shape. Iron on low heat if required. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

220 GSM hefty cotton fabric for a premium, structured feel. Slim-fit, body-hugging design that enhances natural shape. 96% cotton and 4% spandex blend for softness, flexibility, and comfort. Breathable construction suitable for everyday wear. Excellent stretch and recovery for long-term shape retention. Made in India with a focus on quality craftsmanship.

entry.title: FEAR NO ONE - WAFFLE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1899.00 - 1949.00 (6 variants)

240 GSM. Premium Waffle Knit Fabric. Baggy Fit with Knit Collar. Front & Back Vinyl Prints. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This 240 GSM waffle knit collar tee from Drip Studios blends structure with a relaxed, baggy silhouette for an elevated everyday look. Crafted from premium waffle fabric, it offers breathable comfort with a rich texture and lasting softness. The front features the Drip Signature Number 9 in high-quality vinyl print, keeping the design bold yet refined, while the back makes a powerful statement with “FEAR NO ONE” in durable vinyl printing. Finished with a knit collar for a clean, polished touch, this tee is combed and bio-washed to ensure superior comfort, shape retention, and long-term wear.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain fabric quality and vinyl prints. Avoid direct ironing on prints. Store folded in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

240 GSM premium waffle knit fabric for a textured, breathable feel. Perfect baggy fit for a relaxed yet structured silhouette. Knit collar for a clean and elevated finish. Front Drip Signature Number 9 vinyl print with bold “FEAR NO ONE” back print. High-quality vinyl printing for durability and sharp detailing. Unisex design suitable for all body types. Combed and bio-washed cotton for enhanced softness and longevity.

entry.title: RESILIENCE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: dripcult
Price: 1699.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Boxy-Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Piping Work & Embroidery.

This 260 GSM boxy-fit T-shirt is designed for a strong, confident everyday statement with premium comfort at its core. Crafted from 100% French terry cotton, it offers a soft yet substantial feel with excellent breathability and durability. The design is elevated with refined piping work across the shoulders and front, adding depth and structure to the silhouette. Premium embroidery detailing on both the front and back enhances the overall craftsmanship, delivering a clean yet bold aesthetic. Finished with combed and bio-washed fabric, this tee ensures lasting softness, shape retention, and all-day wearability.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and embroidery detailing. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to avoid shrinkage. Do not iron directly on embroidery. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM French terry cotton for a premium, heavyweight feel. Boxy fit for a relaxed and modern silhouette. Piping work across shoulders and front for elevated detailing. Front and back embroidery for a refined, high-quality finish. Gender-neutral design suitable for diverse body types. Combed and bio-washed fabric for superior softness, durability, and long-lasting comfort.

entry.title: WHITE DRY-FIT VEST
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 1199.00

Lightweight Fabric. Slim Fit. Sleeveless Vest. 100% Recycled Polyester. Dry Fit Performance.

This slim-fit Dry Fit vest is designed for comfort and performance across all athletic activities. Crafted from lightweight recycled polyester, it feels soft against the skin while allowing maximum airflow and unrestricted movement. The moisture-wicking Dry Fit fabric helps keep you dry and comfortable during workouts, training sessions, and active routines. Finished with a clean, minimal silhouette, this vest delivers a sleek athletic look while supporting high-performance wear.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash with similar colors in cold water. Avoid fabric softeners to maintain moisture-wicking performance. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

Lightweight recycled polyester fabric for breathability and comfort. Slim fit for a close-to-body, performance-ready feel. Sleeveless design for enhanced airflow and freedom of movement. Dry Fit technology helps manage moisture during any athletic activity. True to size—recommended to order your usual size.

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to preserve fabric quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain the fabric’s integrity.

Core Features

240 GSM French terry fabric for a lightweight yet premium feel. Cropped length with full raglan sleeves for a relaxed, modern fit. Gender-neutral design suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton for all-day comfort. Bio-washed finish ensures durability and a smooth hand feel.

entry.title: RULES BREAKER II - WAFFLE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1899.00

240 GSM. Premium Waffle Fabric. Oversized Fit with Raglan Sleeves. Front Embroidery & Back Silicone Print. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This oversized 240 GSM waffle T-shirt from Drip Studios is built for comfort with a refined edge. Designed with raglan sleeves for enhanced mobility and a relaxed drape, it delivers a super-comfy yet decent silhouette. The front features a clean embroidered “Rules Breaker” logo, keeping it minimal and premium, while the back makes a bold statement with a high-quality silicone print reading “Rules Breaker.” Crafted from combed and bio-washed cotton waffle fabric, this tee offers breathability, texture, and lasting softness—perfect for elevated everyday wear.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and detailing. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric and prints.

Core Features

240 GSM waffle fabric for a textured, premium feel. Oversized fit for a relaxed and comfortable silhouette. Raglan sleeves for improved movement and fit. Front embroidered logo with back silicone print for durability and style. Unisex design suitable for multiple body types. Combed and bio-washed cotton for superior softness and long-la

entry.title: BLACK POLO
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

220 GSM. Super Premium Matte Lycra Fabric. Refined Polo Construction. Combed & Bio-washed. Gender-Neutral. Tailored Regular Fit.

This super-premium 220 GSM polo T-shirt from Drip Studios is designed for those who appreciate quiet luxury in everyday essentials. Crafted from a refined matte lycra blend, the fabric offers a smooth, elevated finish with natural stretch for comfort and structure. The tailored regular fit delivers a sharp, composed silhouette, while the classic polo collar adds a touch of timeless sophistication.

Combed and bio-washed for exceptional softness and durability, this polo balances breathability, polish, and long-lasting performance. Built to transition seamlessly from relaxed settings to elevated occasions, it stands as a modern wardrobe staple defined by restraint, precision, and premium craftsmanship.

Care Guide

Wash inside out with similar colors using cold water to preserve the fabric’s finish and depth. Avoid harsh detergents. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and elasticity. Store folded in a cool, dry space to retain its premium quality.

Core Features

220 GSM super-premium matte lycra fabric for a smooth, luxurious finish. Refined polo collar for timeless versatility. Tailored regular fit for a composed, elevated silhouette. Combed cotton blend ensures breathability and all-day comfort. Bio-washed treatment enhances softness, durability, and fabric longevity.

entry.title: FEAR NO ONE - LTD. ED.
entry.summary:
Vendor: dripdrip.dopedesk
Type:
Price: 2409.00

420 GSM
PREMIUM 100% COTTON FLEECE
RAGLAN SLEEVE CONSTRUCTION
HIGH-DENSITY FRONT & BACK PRINT
KANGAROO POCKET WITH STRUCTURED HOOD
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Ultra-heavy 420 GSM fabric delivers superior structure, warmth, and durability.
  • Relaxed, baggy fit designed for effortless movement and everyday comfort.
  • Raglan sleeves enhance mobility while adding a modern, athletic edge.
  • High-density “DRIP STUDIOS – FEAR NO ONE” front print makes a bold statement.
  • Curved “FOCUS YOUR ENERGY” back graphic adds depth and visual impact.
  • Functional kangaroo pocket provides warmth and daily utility.
  • Soft, breathable jersey backing ensures all-day comfort.
  • Built as a statement hoodie that balances intent, style, and longevity.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the hoodie inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to preserve structure and finish.

Core Features

  • Hoodie constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a substantial, premium feel.
  • Baggy fit suitable for relaxed and versatile styling.
  • Unisex article designed for a wide range of body types.
  • Front pouch pocket for everyday convenience and warmth.
  • Soft, breathable jersey fabric promotes comfort and airflow.
  • Long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem for a secure, structured fit.
